S.FORM: Paul Birch sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1910, ryax sa tay 10 nqu tay 1, Paul Birch, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

(mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
